---
title: "Education"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<div class="cv-entry cv-entry-edu">
  <div class="cv-entry-meta">
    <div>
      <div class="cv-entry-title">PhD Ecology</div>
      <div class="cv-entry-org">University of Aberdeen &middot; Aberdeen, Scotland</div>
    </div>
    <span class="cv-entry-badge">2016 – 2021</span>
  </div>
  <ul class="cv-entry-list">
    <li>Rodent pest population dynamics.</li>
    <li>Publications: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.agee.2018.11.013" target="_blank">Roos et al. (2019)</a> and <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/ele.14074" target="_blank">Roos et al. (2022)</a>.</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry cv-entry-edu">
  <div class="cv-entry-meta">
    <div>
      <div class="cv-entry-title">BSc (Hons) Zoology</div>
      <div class="cv-entry-org">University of Aberdeen &middot; Aberdeen, Scotland</div>
    </div>
    <span class="cv-entry-badge">2012 – 2016</span>
  </div>
  <ul class="cv-entry-list">
    <li>Graduated First Class.</li>
    <li>Thesis: <a href="./theses/DeonRoos_2015.pdf" target="_blank">Water vole ecosystem engineering</a>.</li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

[$\leftarrow$ Back to CV Overview](cv.qmd)
